g.text: user_ID: UUID {primary key, foreign key -> User.ID}
user_ID: UUID {primary key, foreign key -> User.ID} '«Links back to User for login»'
Process_Type: ENUM {Civil, Criminal, Corporate, Family, Other}
CHECK (closed_at IS NULL OR closed_at >= created_at)
file: BLOB NOT NULL '«Stored directly in DB as requested»'
recipient_ID: UUID {foreign key -> User.ID} '«Recipient can be Client, Lawyer, or Admin»'
sender_ID: UUID {foreign key -> User.ID} '«Sender is a User (Client or Lawyer)»'
client_ID: UUID {foreign key -> Client.user_ID} '«Specific FK to Client role ID»'
operation: ENUM {CREATE, UPDATE, CLOSE, REOPEN, DELETE}
